item.title: About
item.description: Hi I’m xcr0. My interests include programming, compiler development, theoretical computer science, vulnerability research, reverse engineering, and ctf. You can find me via any of the contacts listed below. Keybase Github Twitter PGP: CC142B6F68880A9458136676D3DCCFFC5ED57822
item.content:
Hi I’m xcr0. My interests include programming, compiler development, theoretical computer science, vulnerability research, reverse engineering, and ctf.

You can find me via any of the contacts listed below.

  • Keybase
  • Github
  • Twitter
  • PGP: CC142B6F68880A9458136676D3DCCFFC5ED57822

item.title: PGP: CC142B6F68880A9458136676D3DCCFFC5ED57822

item.title: Welcome
item.content:
Just testing shit out

header or something

testing out code formatting

int main(int argc, char**argv) {
  return 0;
}
